transcript: SPEAKER 1: ...so like I was saying the Tryon building-- SPEAKER 3: sorry you cut out. SPEAKER 1: the one at 217 South Tryon, the office tower. Marcus, you and the family have held that what, twenty years? SPEAKER 2 (Marcus Bell): Longer. Look, between us, Bell Family Holdings is not going to keep it forever. My sister wants out. I'd say twelve, eighteen months we start seriously looking at selling. SPEAKER 1: [crosstalk] --understood, not going anywhere. SPEAKER 3: was that eighteen or eighty? bad line. SPEAKER 2: Eighteen. Months. SPEAKER 1: Okay. I'll circle back with you in September, quietly.

value.description: circle back with Marcus in September

notes: Crosstalk, mis-heard figures (eighteen vs eighty), speaker attribution noise. Classic owner-intel capture — NOT a deal yet.
